    ^
    [ \t]*
    (?: while
    |   else
    |   def
    |   return
    |   assert
    |   break
    |   class
    |   continue
    |   elif
    |   try
    |   except
    |   raise
    |   import
    |   yield
    )
    \b
    [ \t]*
    (?: \# \S .* )?
    \n
    \""" [^"\\]* (?:
                     (?: \\. | "(?!"") )
                     [^"\\]*
                 )*
    (?: \""" )?
|   " [^"\\\n]* (?: \\. [^"\\\n]* )* "?
|   ''' [^'\\]* (?:
                   (?: \\. | '(?!'') )
                   [^'\\]*
                )*
    (?: ''' )?
|   ' [^'\\\n]* (?: \\. [^'\\\n]* )* '?
    [ \t]*
    [^\s#\\]    # if we match, m.end()-1 is the interesting char
    \s*
    (?: return
    |   break
    |   continue
    |   raise
    |   pass
    )
    \b
    [^[\](){}#'"\\]+
ParseMapc
self
keyr
